_doc: Snapshot of the v11 cycle-mechanism board. The home Macro Overview tile + the /#overview iframe both read these values so the two surfaces stay aligned. Mock calibration data; replaced by live values when the v11 calc engine ports to React. Source of truth: trading-scanner/run_cycle_board_calibration.py (pending build, see LESSONS_FUTURE).

aggregate.headline: Risk-off setup — four of six mechanisms elevated. Equity valuations at peak, credit complacent, policy restrictive, positioning stretched. Only Funding and Growth remain calm.

mechanisms.name: Valuation
mechanisms.caption: Cycle peak — multiple valuation reads in the top quartile of long-run history.

mechanisms.name: Credit
mechanisms.caption: Spreads pricing complacency — IG and HY tighter than pre-2008. Late-cycle signature.

mechanisms.name: Funding
mechanisms.caption: Funding stable — bills/repo functioning, no stress in money markets.

mechanisms.name: Growth
mechanisms.caption: Growth coasting — soft-landing trajectory; not accelerating, not contracting.

mechanisms.name: Liquidity & Policy
mechanisms.caption: Restrictive stance — real Fed funds positive, M2 growth slow, balance sheet still in QT mode.

mechanisms.name: Positioning & Breadth
mechanisms.caption: Crowded positioning — speculator long, breadth narrow. Mean-reversion risk.
